description: CustomDefaultChar (default char style, italic=on, sz=28, color=FF0000). Tests that unstyled runs inherit from the default character style, and that explicit char styles merge with the default char style underneath.

expected.para_1: italic=ON, sz=28, color=FF0000 (from default char style)
expected.para_2: bold=ON (from OverrideChar), italic=ON (default char), sz=28 (default char), color=FF0000 (default char)
